---
name: bug report
about: create a report to inform us of bugs to fix!
title: ''

assignees: ''

---

**describe the bug**
a short description generally stating what the bug is! (logs/screenshots/videos allowed!)

**how to replicate the bug**
steps to reproduce the buggy behavior (screenshots/videos allowed!)


**device:**
 - OS: [e.g. Windows 11 64-bit]
 - Version [e.g. 1.0.9]

**additional context**
if you have any additional thoughts go ahead!
